title: Mounam Pesum Lyrics Amara Kaaviyam Song Lyrics
stanzas:
Song: Mounam Pesum
Singer(s): K.S.Chitra, Sowmya Mahadevan
Movie: Amara Kaaviyam
Music: M Ghibran

Mounam Pesum Vaarthai Yaavum
Aethetho Aasaigal Thondriduthey
Kaalam Seiyum Maayam Pothum
Soodatha Pookalum Vaadiduthey
Pirivendru Aethum Illai
Uyir Endru Aana Pinne
Nee Endraal Nee Illai Naane Naanethaane
Methu Methuvaai Thiru Uruvaai Aanaai Aanaai

Aasai Aasai Kondu
Oosai Oosai Indri
Naalum Naanum Varuven
Kodi Kodi Yugam
Naadi Naadi Vanthu
Sevai Sevai Puriven

Kaalame Kaikodu
Kaathal Kaathal Ennalum Neela

Oru Nooru Aayul Vaazha

Kaalam Seiyum Maayam Pothum
Soodatha Pookalum Vaadiduthey

Alaigal Polavea, Kaathal Mothume
Seruma Or Karai

Annaalum Vanthey Serum..

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song 'Mounam Pesum'?

'Mounam Pesum' conveys deep emotions of love and the unspoken feelings that often accompany it, reflecting on the beauty of silence in relationships.

What is the context of this song in the movie 'Amara Kaaviyam'?

In Amara Kaaviyam, this song plays during a pivotal moment that highlights the emotional connection between the lead characters, enhancing the narrative of love and longing.

Who are the singers of 'Mounam Pesum'?

The song features the talented voices of K.S.Chitra and Sowmya Mahadevan, both renowned for their melodious singing styles.

Who composed the music for 'Mounam Pesum'?

The music for this beautiful song was composed by M Ghibran, known for his ability to blend traditional and contemporary sounds.

When was 'Mounam Pesum' released?

'Mounam Pesum' was released on July 5, 2014, as part of the movie Amara Kaaviyam.
enrichedMetadata.summary: In Mounam Pesum, the serene melodies and heartfelt lyrics encapsulate the profound emotions of love and connection. The song unfolds during a significant moment in Amara Kaaviyam, where the characters reflect on their feelings and the silence that often speaks volumes. With the soothing voices of K.S.Chitra and Sowmya Mahadevan, it evokes a sense of nostalgia and longing. The composition by M Ghibran further enhances the romantic atmosphere, making it a perfect choice for intimate occasions.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Mounam Pesum from Amara Kaaviyam is a mesmerizing duet that beautifully captures the essence of love and longing. With the enchanting voices of K.S.Chitra and Sowmya Mahadevan, paired with M Ghibran's soulful composition, this song is sure to resonate with anyone who has experienced deep emotions. Dive into the soothing melodies and let the lyrics transport you to a world of romance and reflection.
stanzaMeanings: Words spoken in silence bring forth desires and dreams. Time creates magic, flowers bloom and sing. There is no separation; if you are life, then if you say you are not, I am. I am the essence, the divine form, always present.
With desires, I bring sounds. Even today, I will come. In every era, I will come, bringing service and care.
Pure thoughts speak in the heart. Time gives love, yet the sky remains. Oh.. to live a hundred years.
Words spoken in silence bring forth desires and dreams. Time creates magic, flowers bloom and sing.
Like waves, does love unite? A single shore, all together, without separation. One day, it will all come together. Oh.. but it will come together.
With desires, I bring sounds. Even today, I will come. In every era, I will come, bringing service and care.

Words spoken in silence bring forth desires and dreams. Time creates magic, flowers bloom and sing. There is no separation; if you are life, then if you say you are not, I am. I am the essence, the divine form, always present.
With desires, I bring sounds. Even today, I will come. In every era, I will come, bringing service and care.
